title: Fix Stored XSS in Metric Name Field
description:
**Penetration Test Finding — High Severity (CVSS 7.1)**

The Metric Name field in the Metrics Glossary was vulnerable to Stored XSS. Users with metric creation permissions could inject JavaScript payloads in the Name field that would execute for all users visiting the Metrics page.

## Fix

Input sanitization applied to the Metric Name field before storage, stripping HTML/script tags to prevent stored XSS.
acceptance_criteria: HTML and script tags are sanitized from the Metric Name field before storage
XSS payloads in Metric Name are neutralized
middleware_changes: Input sanitization applied to the Metric Name field in the metric creation controller.
implementation_notes: Same sanitization approach as MBT-430/432 applied to the metric creation flow for the Name field.
comment_summary: Developer fixed and pushed to staging.
